input: user-item interaction sequences and user-item bipartite graph
output: next-item prediction (ranked list of candidate items)
backbone: GNN for inter-sequence correlation + GRU and attention for intra-sequence correlation
key_idea: explicitly model inter-sequence item correlations via GNN on user-item and item-item graphs, combined with intra-sequence GRU/attention
datasets: three real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
